completeMarriageOutcome.statement: {M W : Type*} (mu : Assignment M W) = (\forall m, \exists w, mu.m_match m = some w) \land (\forall w, \exists m, mu.w_match w = some m)

corollary5_1_no_need_to_misrepresent_fir.statement:
orall {M : Type u_1} {W : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype M] [inst_1 : Fintype W] [inst_2 : DecidableEq M] [inst_3 : DecidableEq W] [Nonempty M] [Nonempty W], ( orall (val_m : M 	o W 	o ℝ) (val_w : W 	o M 	o ℝ), strictMarriageDomain val_m val_w 	o  orall (w : W) (report_w : M 	o ℝ), \exists report_w', ( orall (mstar : M), ( orall (m : M), m 
e mstar 	o val_w w m < val_w w mstar) 	o  orall (m : M), m 
e mstar 	o report_w' m < report_w' mstar) \land (match (menDeferredAcceptance val_m (update val_w w report_w)).w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m) \le match (menDeferredAcceptance val_m (update val_w w report_w')).w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m) \land  orall (val_m : M 	o W 	o ℝ) (val_w : W 	o M 	o ℝ), strictMarriageDomain val_m val_w 	o  orall (m : M) (report_m : W 	o ℝ), \exists report_m', ( orall (wstar : W), ( orall (w : W), w 
e wstar 	o val_m m w < val_m m wstar) 	o  orall (w : W), w 
e wstar 	o report_m' w < report_m' wstar) \land (match (womenDeferredAcceptance (update val_m m report_m) val_w).m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w) \le match (womenDeferredAcceptance (update val_m m report_m') val_w).m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w

efficientMatchingProcedure.statement: {M W : Type*} (mechanism : (M \to W \to ℝ) \to (W \to M \to ℝ) \to Assignment M W) = \forall val_m val_w, paretoOptimal val_m val_w (mechanism val_m val_w)

lemma1_strict_simple_misrepresentation_s.statement: \forall {M : Type u_1} {W : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype M] [inst_1 : Fintype W] [inst_2 : DecidableEq M] [inst_3 : DecidableEq W] (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ) (m : M) (report_m simple_report_m : W \to ℝ) (wstar : W), strictMarriageDomain (update val_m m simple_report_m) val_w \to (menDeferredAcceptance (update val_m m report_m) val_w).m_match m = some wstar \to (\forall (w : W), w \ne wstar \to simple_report_m w < simple_report_m wstar) \to (menDeferredAcceptance (update val_m m simple_report_m) val_w).m_match m = (menDeferredAcceptance (update val_m m report_m) val_w).m_match m

lemma2_strict_simple_misrepresentation_n.statement: \forall {M : Type u_1} {W : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype M] [inst_1 : Fintype W] [inst_2 : DecidableEq M] [inst_3 : DecidableEq W] (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ) (m : M) (simple_report_m : W \to ℝ) (ystar : W), card M = card W \to strictMarriageDomain val_m val_w \to strictMarriageDomain (update val_m m simple_report_m) val_w \to (menDeferredAcceptance (update val_m m simple_report_m) val_w).m_match m = some ystar \to ((match (menDeferredAcceptance val_m val_w).m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w) \le match (menDeferredAcceptance (update val_m m simple_report_m) val_w).m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w) \to manReportStrictlyRanksPartnerFirst simple_report_m (some ystar) \to \forall (m' : M), (match (menDeferredAcceptance val_m val_w).m_match m' with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m' w) \le match (menDeferredAcceptance (update val_m m simple_report_m) val_w).m_match m' with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m' w

manReportStrictlyRanksPartnerFirst.statement: {W : Type*} (report_m : W \to ℝ) (partner : Option W) = match partner with | none  =>  \forall w, report_m w < 0 | some wstar  =>  \forall w, w \ne wstar \to report_m w < report_m wstar

menDeferredAcceptance.statement: {M W : Type*} [Fintype M] [Fintype W] [DecidableEq M] [DecidableEq W] (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ) = deferredAcceptance val_m val_w

menOptimal.statement: {M W : Type*} (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ) (mu : Assignment M W) = stable val_m val_w mu \land \forall mu', stable val_m val_w mu' \to \forall m, (match mu'.m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w) \le (match mu.m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w)

paretoOptimal.statement: {M W : Type*} (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ) (mu : Assignment M W) = completeMarriageOutcome mu \land \lnot \exists nu, completeMarriageOutcome nu \land (\forall m, (match mu.m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w) \le (match nu.m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w)) \land (\forall w, (match mu.w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m) \le (match nu.w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m)) \land ((\exists m, (match mu.m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w) < (match nu.m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w)) \lor (\exists w, (match mu.w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m) < (match nu.w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m)))

possibleForMan.statement: {M W : Type*} (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ) (m : M) (w : W) = \exists mu, stable val_m val_w mu \land mu.m_match m = some w

preferenceProfile.statement: (M : Type u) (W : Type v) = (M \to W \to ℝ) × (W \to M \to ℝ)

reportMisrepresentsKthChoice.statement: {A : Type*} [Fintype A] [DecidableEq A] (true_score report_score : A \to ℝ) (k : ℕ) = \exists a, ((Finset.univ : Finset A).filter fun b  =>  true_score a < true_score b).card + 1 = k \land ((Finset.univ : Finset A).filter fun b  =>  report_score a < report_score b).card + 1 \ne k

serialDictatorshipMechanism_matches.statement: \forall {n : ℕ} (val_m val_w : Fin n \to Fin n \to ℝ) (m w : Fin n), (serialDictatorshipMechanism val_m val_w).m_match m = some ((paper_serial_dictatorship_perm val_m) m) \land (serialDictatorshipMechanism val_m val_w).w_match w = some ((symm (paper_serial_dictatorship_perm val_m)) w)

stable.statement: {M W : Type*} (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ) (mu : Assignment M W) = (\forall m, 0 \le (match mu.m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w)) \land (\forall w, 0 \le (match mu.w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m)) \land (\forall m w, (match mu.m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w'  =>  val_m m w') < val_m m w \to val_w w m \le (match mu.w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m'  =>  val_w w m'))

stableMatchingProcedure.statement: {M W : Type*} (mechanism : (M \to W \to ℝ) \to (W \to M \to ℝ) \to Assignment M W) = \forall val_m val_w, (\forall m w w', val_m m w = val_m m w' \to w = w') \to (\forall w m m', val_w w m = val_w w m' \to m = m') \to stable val_m val_w (mechanism val_m val_w)

stableOutcomes.statement: {M W : Type*} (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ) = {mu | stable val_m val_w mu}

strictMarriageDomain.statement: {M W : Type*} (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ) = (\forall m w w', val_m m w = val_m m w' \to w = w') \land (\forall w m m', val_w w m = val_w w m' \to m = m') \land (\forall m w, 0 < val_m m w) \land (\forall w m, 0 < val_w w m)

theorem1_stable_complete_outcome_exists_.statement: \forall {M : Type u_1} {W : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype M] [inst_1 : Fintype W] [DecidableEq M] [DecidableEq W] (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ), card M = card W \to strictMarriageDomain val_m val_w \to \exists mu, stable val_m val_w mu \land completeMarriageOutcome mu

theorem2_optimal_stable_outcomes_on_stri.statement: \forall {M : Type u_1} {W : Type u_2} [Fintype M] [Fintype W] [DecidableEq M] [DecidableEq W] (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ), strictMarriageDomain val_m val_w \to (\exists mu, menOptimal val_m val_w mu) \land \exists nu, womenOptimal val_m val_w nu

theorem4_serial_dictatorship_constructed.statement: \forall {n : ℕ}, (\forall (val_m val_w : Fin n \to Fin n \to ℝ), (\forall (m w w' : Fin n), val_m m w = val_m m w' \to w = w') \to paretoOptimal val_m val_w (serialDictatorshipMechanism val_m val_w)) \land (\forall (val_m val_w : Fin n \to Fin n \to ℝ), (\forall (m w w' : Fin n), val_m m w = val_m m w' \to w = w') \to \forall (m : Fin n) (report_m : Fin n \to ℝ), (match (serialDictatorshipMechanism (update val_m m report_m) val_w).m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w) \le match (serialDictatorshipMechanism val_m val_w).m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w) \land \forall (val_m val_w : Fin n \to Fin n \to ℝ) (w : Fin n) (report_w : Fin n \to ℝ), (match (serialDictatorshipMechanism val_m (update val_w w report_w)).w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m) \le match (serialDictatorshipMechanism val_m val_w).w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m

theorem5_optimal_side_truthful_on_strict.statement: \forall {M : Type u_1} {W : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype M] [inst_1 : Fintype W] [inst_2 : DecidableEq M] [inst_3 : DecidableEq W] (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ), card M = card W \to strictMarriageDomain val_m val_w \to (\forall (m : M) (report_m : W \to ℝ), (match (menDeferredAcceptance (update val_m m report_m) val_w).m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w) \le match (menDeferredAcceptance val_m val_w).m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w) \land \forall (w : W) (report_w : M \to ℝ), (match (womenDeferredAcceptance val_m (update val_w w report_w)).w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m) \le match (womenDeferredAcceptance val_m val_w).w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m

theorem6_weak_pareto_for_men_on_strict_m.statement: \forall {M : Type u_1} {W : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype M] [inst_1 : Fintype W] [inst_2 : DecidableEq M] [inst_3 : DecidableEq W] [Nonempty M] (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ), card M = card W \to strictMarriageDomain val_m val_w \to \lnot\exists nu, completeMarriageOutcome nu \land \forall (m : M), (match (menDeferredAcceptance val_m val_w).m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w) < match m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w

theorem7_arbitrary_k_on_strict_profiles.statement: \forall (k : ℕ), 1 < k \to \exists n, paper_no_stable_procedure_avoids_strict_kth_choice_manipulation_on (Fin n) (Fin n) k

truthfulForAllAgents.statement: {M W : Type*} [DecidableEq M] [DecidableEq W] (mechanism : (M \to W \to ℝ) \to (W \to M \to ℝ) \to Assignment M W) = (\forall val_m val_w, (\forall m w w', val_m m w = val_m m w' \to w = w') \to (\forall w m m', val_w w m = val_w w m' \to m = m') \to \forall m report_m, (\forall i w w', ((Function.update val_m m report_m) i) w = ((Function.update val_m m report_m) i) w' \to w = w') \to (match (mechanism (Function.update val_m m report_m) val_w).m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w) \le (match (mechanism val_m val_w).m_match m with | none  =>  0 | some w  =>  val_m m w)) \land (\forall val_m val_w, (\forall m w w', val_m m w = val_m m w' \to w = w') \to (\forall w m m', val_w w m = val_w w m' \to m = m') \to \forall w report_w, (\forall j m m', ((Function.update val_w w report_w) j) m = ((Function.update val_w w report_w) j) m' \to m = m') \to (match (mechanism val_m (Function.update val_w w report_w)).w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m) \le (match (mechanism val_m val_w).w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m))

womenDeferredAcceptance.statement: {M W : Type*} [Fintype M] [Fintype W] [DecidableEq M] [DecidableEq W] (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ) = (deferredAcceptance (M = W) (W = M) val_w val_m).swap

womenOptimal.statement: {M W : Type*} (val_m : M \to W \to ℝ) (val_w : W \to M \to ℝ) (mu : Assignment M W) = stable val_m val_w mu \land \forall mu', stable val_m val_w mu' \to \forall w, (match mu'.w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m) \le (match mu.w_match w with | none  =>  0 | some m  =>  val_w w m)
